title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Uniondale, NY | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Uniondale, Long Island. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Bats in your Uniondale attic or commercial property require immediate professional attention. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Uniondale and Long Island, using humane methods that comply with all New York wildlife regulations. Our certified technicians safely remove bat colonies and seal entry points to prevent future infestations.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Uniondale homeowners and businesses, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with specialized bat removal techniques. Our licensed team provides thorough inspections, humane exclusion, cleanup of guano contamination, and guaranteed long-term protection for your property.
localContext: Uniondale's mix of residential neighborhoods and commercial properties near the Nassau Coliseum and Hofstra University area often attract bats seeking roosting sites in attics, chimneys, and building eaves. The mature trees throughout neighborhoods like Uniondale Park and proximity to Eisenhower Park create ideal habitats that can lead bats to seek shelter in nearby structures during migration and breeding seasons.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Uniondale?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Uniondale typically range from $900 to $2,500 depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, extent of contamination, and accessibility of roosting areas. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Uniondale safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New York State wildlife regulations for humane bat exclusion. We use one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but prevent re-entry, never trapping bats inside. We also observe seasonal restrictions to protect maternity colonies during pup-rearing season from May through August.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my Uniondale home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, dark stains near entry points, accumulation of small dark droppings (guano) in attics or near walls, strong ammonia-like odors, and seeing bats entering or exiting your home at sunset. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: Do you clean up bat guano and sanitize affected areas?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Bat guano cleanup is a critical part of our service. We safely remove contaminated insulation and droppings, sanitize affected areas to eliminate histoplasmosis risks, deodorize spaces, and can restore insulation if needed. All guano removal follows proper safety protocols including protective equipment and containment procedures.
